description_long: This object consists of a small group of thick, hardcover books arranged together, with one book open to reveal detailed, monochrome illustrations and text on its pages. The covers are a deep, dark brown, with a matte finish and no visible artwork or text. The books have slightly uneven, textured pages, giving them a well-used, vintage appearance. The open book displays intricate line drawings, possibly of anatomical or scientific subjects, rendered in a muted gray tone. The spines and covers are plain, lacking any decorative elements or visible titles. The overall look is utilitarian and scholarly, suitable for a study, library, or academic setting.
description: A group of thick, dark brown hardcover books, one open to reveal detailed monochrome illustrations and text. The covers are plain and matte, with no visible titles or artwork.
description_view_0: Front view showing four closed books and one open book with visible illustrated pages.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the books and the open book's layered pages.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, dark brown covers and the spines of the closed books.
description_view_3: Angled view focusing on the closed books' covers and the open book's illustrated pages.
attribute_spine_design: The spines are plain dark brown with no visible text, patterns, or decorative elements.
